sql: SELECT id, name, status, department, title FROM users WHERE CASE WHEN #{role} = 'admin' THEN (CASE WHEN #{dept} IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN #{title} IS NOT NULL THEN department = #{dept} AND title = #{title} ELSE department = #{dept} END) ELSE 1=1 END) WHEN #{role} = 'manager' THEN (CASE WHEN #{status} IS NOT NULL THEN status = #{status} ELSE status = 'active' END) ELSE status = 'public' END
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, status, department, title FROM users
<choose>
    <when test="role == 'admin'">
        <choose>
            <when test="dept != null">
                <choose>
                    <when test="title != null">
                        WHERE department = #{dept} AND title = #{title}
                    </when>
                    <otherwise>
                        WHERE department = #{dept}
                    </otherwise>
                </choose>
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                WHERE 1=1
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
    </when>
    <when test="role == 'manager'">
        <choose>
            <when test="status != null">
                WHERE status = #{status}
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                WHERE status = 'active'
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        WHERE status = 'public'
    </otherwise>
</choose>
